articles.title: 'Running off the cliff': An explosion of household debt has put the US economy in a tough spot - Business Insider
articles.description: Americans are borrowing more and saving less. That's created a major vulnerability in the US economy, SocGen is warning.
articles.content:
America's swelling debt pile bodes ill for the the US economy, Société Générale said.
In a recent note to clients, the European Bank flagged a concerning trend that's taken hold in the US in recent … [+2343 chars]

articles.title: The 'magic number' for a comfortable retirement just got bigger - USA Today
articles.description: The "magic number" of savings to retire in comfort keeps rising. But how many Americans actually retire with a seven-figure sum?
articles.content:
Retirement planners sometimes speak of a "magic number": a rough estimate of how much money an American might need to retire in comfort.
Not surprisingly, the number keeps rising.
